title: 信息日报 2026-06-23

headline.title: OpenAI 启动“Patch the Planet”计划，助力开源社区修复漏洞
headline.summary: OpenAI 推出“Patch the Planet”计划，作为 Daybreak 项目的一部分，利用 AI 和专家审核帮助开源维护者发现、验证并修复漏洞。此举旨在应对开源软件日益严峻的安全挑战。
headline.title_en: OpenAI launches 'Patch the Planet' initiative to help find and patch open-source bugs
headline.summary_en: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review, addressing growing security challenges in open-source software.
headline.original_title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
headline.reason: 该计划标志着 AI 安全从模型层延伸至开源生态，具有广泛影响；结合三星部署 ChatGPT 等新闻，凸显 AI 企业级应用与安全并进趋势。
headline.reason_en: This initiative marks a significant extension of AI security into the open-source ecosystem, with broad implications; combined with Samsung's ChatGPT deployment, it highlights the dual trend of enterprise AI adoption and security.
